title: poa helmsii
intro: Poa helmsii, also known as the red fescue or red tussock grass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Poa helmsii can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
